name: bandit_roof_z_dispatch_fallback_v0_2026-05-03
description: Roof-z dispatch fallback footing: reuse the current-build McWilliams bandit live-world save, move the player just outside the camp's ground approach range, clear legacy local-contact pressure, and seed a scout-confirmed remembered lead whose target identity is on an elevated/tower z-level. The live proof waits through the real dispatch cadence and requires dispatch to route the elevated remembered target through the reachable ground OMT instead of failing route_missing or falling silent behind the 30-minute throttle.

save_transforms.source_summary: fixture-backed scout-return memory aimed at an elevated/roof-z target; dispatch must route through reachable ground instead of route_missing
